rulings.Case Title: ALEX BRANT-ZAWADZKI VS. BOB KORMAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Req. For Judicial Ntc And Pos
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 20, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTs BOB KORMAN and NANCY RYTI's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. Sustain without leave to amend 1st cause of action, violation of Rent Ordinance re Statute of Limitations 1 year; 2nd cause cause of action violation 1940.9 overrule; 3rd cause of action conversion/trespass, overrule, conversion sufficient; 4th and 5th causes of action, fraud and misrepresentation - sustain with leave to amend to address with particularity (who, when, where); 6th, 7th & 8th causes of action, sustain with leave to amend to address with particularity as to dates re Statue of Limitations; 9th cause of action violation of 1950.5, overrule, sufficient re rent deposit (bad faith); 10th cause of action Breach of Contract, sustain with leave to amend to attach contract and or state terms with particularity and nature; 11th cause of action conspiracy - sustain without leave to amend, cannot consipire with self. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARCOS ANDRADE GALVAN VS. ONEWEST BANK, FSB, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions; Memo Of P & A And Dec.
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 20, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT ONEWEST BANK, FSB's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions. Off Calendar. Dismissal filed Dec. 19, 2012. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALIX SANTA-IGLESIA et al VS. BALWANTSINH THAKOR, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA THE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants David Kaplan And Betty Kaplan, Trustees Of The David And Betty Kaplan Trust, And Asm Investment, Inc.'S Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 20, 2012, line 7. Defendants David Kaplan And Betty Kaplan, Trustees Of The David And Betty Kaplan Trust, And Asm Investment, Inc.'S Demurrer To Complaint. Sustain with leave to amend to allege 1) Nature of contracts; 2) Parties to contracts; 3) Facts re agency and or facts as to all elements of each cause of action based on acts or omissions of moving defendants. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HEDDI CUNDLE VS. MATTEO GARBELOTTO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 20, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT MATTEO GARBELOTTO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, sufficient facts re contractual causes of action and fraud and statutory causes of action. If recision no waiver and misrepresentation predates litigation. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HEDDI CUNDLE VS. MATTEO GARBELOTTO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 20, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT VICTOR MARQUEZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to allege facts re agency, ownership, management of property. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DIPAK GANDHI VS. KARENA A. FENG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 20, 2012, line 4. PLAINTIFF DIPAK GANDHI's And Motion For Preliminary Injunction. Grant Preliminary Injunction. Defendant 1) Enjoined from interfering with plaintiff's tenancy in any way other than proceeding with unlawful detainer, 2) Should remit all rents to plaintiff if any collected or received from tenants. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JEAN CLAUDE LAIR VS. KRZYSZTOF KONDRACIUK et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 20, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT KRZYSZTOF KONDRACIUK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to allege compliance with or exemption from San Francisco Rent Ordinance. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JEAN CLAUDE LAIR VS. KRZYSZTOF KONDRACIUK et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 20, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT KRZYSZTOF KONDRACIUK's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Grant motion to strike with leave to amend to date verification and complete paragraph 17F. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PRINCE HALL APARTMENTS VS. DONTAVIOUS BAKER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 20, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT DONTAVIOUS BAKER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to reconcile complaint indicating not aware of rental amount and three day notice setting forth specific sums. = (501/REQ)
